item.label: Fix move() for work-packages
item.summary: Fix path resolution inconsistency for wp domain in move() operation

body:
# Description

Fix work-package moves so they resolve the correct domain path and behave the same way as task moves.

# Acceptance Criteria

1. Work-packages can move to `contrib`
2. The returned path points at the moved work-package
3. Regression coverage proves wp moves no longer fail

# Notes

- Verified by the passing `move()` coverage tests for work-packages
- Current implementation uses `Paths.kind_dir()` in `PlanningAPI.move()`
